chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D- 516 of 2026 Raheem Traders & another V. Federation of Pakistan & others Present: Mr. Justice Yousuf Ali Sayeed, Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi Date of hearing: 02.02.2026. Date of decision: 02.02.2026. Petitioners: Through Mr. Muneer Ahmed Khan, Advocate. O R D E R Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi, J: The Petitioners, in essence, have attempted to challenge auction proceedings which have allegedly been ordered by the Respondents. The Petitioners have claimed that they are importers of certain cargo, which is now being auctioned by the Respondents. The Petitioners state the Respondents are wrongfully undertaking such auction process, for which the Petitioners have approached this Court. 2. The Petitioners has not provided any Goods Declaration Form, nor any other credible document, showing their right to any cargo / goods. They have not shown any ownership documents, nor have they provided any nexus between their cargo and any auction proceedings being undertaken by the Respondents. Moreover, the Petitioners have simply filed this instant Petition with baseless assertions, without offering any legitimate grounds. They have also failed to provide any just cause requiring interference with the actions of the Respondents, and have not established any violation of fundamental or other such rights, which is sine qua non for invocation of the Constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. 3. Accordingly, this Petition being devoid of any merit was dismissed in limine on 02.02.2026 along with listed applications. Above are the reasons thereof. Petition dismissed. Judge Judge Ayaz
